<?php namespace Http\Discovery\Exception; use Http\Discovery\Exception; /** * Thrown when all discovery strategies fails to find a resource. * * @author Tobias Nyholm <tobias.nyholm@gmail.com> */ final class DiscoveryFailedException extends \Exception implements Exception { /** * @var \Exception[] */ private $exceptions; /** * @param string $message * @param \Exception[] $exceptions */ public function __construct($message, array $exceptions = []) { $this->exceptions = $exceptions; parent::__construct($message); } /** * @param \Exception[] $exceptions */ public static function create($exceptions) { $message = 'Could not find resource using any discovery strategy. Find more information at http://docs.php-http.org/en/latest/discovery.html#common-errors'; foreach ($exceptions as $e) { $message .= "\n - ".$e->getMessage(); } $message .= "\n\n"; return new self($message, $exceptions); } /** * @return \Exception[] */ public function getExceptions() { return $this->exceptions; } }
